name: Bug

labels: bug
title: "[<Page>] "
---
Claude Code - YY-MM-DD

## Issue
<4-6 lines, plain English — what is broken and why does it matter to the user? No code, no jargon.>

## Repro / Steps
1. <step>
2. <step>
3. <step>

## Expected vs Actual
- **Expected:** <what the user wants to see>
- **Actual:** <what they currently see>

## Environment + Severity
- **Severity:** <low / med / high>
- **Env:** <local / staging / prod>
- **Browser/Device:** <e.g. iPhone 14 Safari, Chrome 124 desktop>
- **Related logs:** <link to Troubleshooting log entry if any>

## Technical Requirement
<Each bullet = **bold business outcome** — plain-English description, key technical term in parens.
File paths, commit hashes, CSS, and API names belong HERE only — not in sections above.>
